creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
thank you for the patch, which can be imported without problems and the detailed description. Thanks for that :-)

Is the patch working for you? I ran a test with your patch with the following error:

-- SIZEOF_VOIDP 8
CMake Error at cmake/install_layout.cmake:104 (MESSAGE):

  RPM;DEB;SVR4;TARGZ;STANDALONE
